careers.title: Mahi i DeHub
careers.subtitle: Honoa ki te rōpū e hanga ana i te anamata o ngā pāpāho pāpori whakamahana
careers.intro: E rapu ana mātou i ngā tāngata ngākaunui e hiahia ana ki te whai wāhi ki te ngaru pāpāho pāpori e haere mai ana — tērā e whakanui ana i ngā kaihanga me ngā hapori. Ko ngā tūranga katoa he mahi mamao katoa me ngā hāora mārire.
careers.bdmAbout: Hei kaiwhakahaere whanaketanga pakihi i DeHub, ko koe te kaha kawe o tā mātou rautaki hononga.
careers.bdmResp1: Kimi me te whakaū hononga rautaki me ngā kamupene Web2 me Web3 e hāngai ana ki te kaupapa o DeHub
careers.bdmResp2: Hanga me te whakahaere i te rārangi o ngā hononga, kaitautoko me ngā āheinga whakakotahi
careers.bdmResp3: Māngai i DeHub i ngā hui ahumahi, wānanga me ngā hui mariko
careers.bdmResp4: Kōrero mō ngā tikanga hononga, tauira tuari moni me ngā kirimana hokohoko tahi
careers.bdmResp5: Mahi tahi me ngā rōpū hua me ngā rōpū hokohoko ki te hanga kaupapa tahi me ngā whakakotahi
careers.whatWereLooking: He aha tā mātou e rapu ana
careers.bdmReq1: Wheako kua whakaūngia i te whanaketanga pakihi, hononga, hoko rānei i te ahumahi hangarau, kēmu, Web3 rānei
careers.bdmReq2: He whatunga kaha o nāianei i te wāhi crypto/Web3, ōhanga kaihanga rānei he painga nui
careers.bdmReq3: He pūkenga whakawhiti kōrero me kōrero pai rawa — ka taea e koe te whakaoti hokonga me te hanga hononga roa
careers.bdmReq4: He tangata e ārahi ana i a ia anō, e pai ana ki te mahi motuhake i te taiao mamao
careers.bdmReq5: He hiahia pono ki ngā whatunga pāpāho whakamahana, NFT, hangarau poraka rānei
careers.bdmComp: Ka tuku tēnei tūranga i te utu kōrero me te hanganga utu kōmihana OTE kāore e herea, e hono tika ana ki ngā hononga e kawea mai ana e koe.
careers.uncappedOTE: hanganga utu kōmihana OTE kāore e herea
careers.ambassadorAbout: Hei kaimāngai waitohu DeHub, ko koe te kanohi me te reo o te pūhara i tō hapori.
careers.ambassadorResp1: Hanga me te tuari ihirangi mana mō DeHub i ō hongere pāpāho pāpori whaiaro
careers.ambassadorResp2: Whai wāhi hohe ki te hapori DeHub i te taupānga — tuku pānui, tākupu me te whai wāhi ki ētahi atu kaiwhakamahi
careers.ambassadorResp3: Whai wāhi me te māngai i DeHub i ngā hui ā-tinana, hui me ngā wānanga i tō rohe
careers.ambassadorResp4: Kukume mai kaiwhakamahi hou me ngā kaihanga ki te pūhara mā tō whatunga whaiaro
careers.ambassadorResp5: Tuku urupare me ngā whakaaro mai i te hapori hei āwhina ki te hanga mahere hua
careers.ambassadorReq1: He noho hohe i ngā pāpāho pāpori me te whai wāhi mana
careers.ambassadorReq2: He ngākaunui ki te Web3, crypto, kēmu, ahurea kaihanga rānei
careers.ambassadorReq3: He pūkenga whakawhiti kōrero kaha me te kaha ki te whakamārama ariā uaua ki te ngāwari
careers.ambassadorReq4: He tangata e ārahi ana i a ia anō, ka taea te whakamahere me te whakatinana kaupapa motuhake
careers.ambassadorReq5: Ko te wheako o mua hei kaimāngai, kaiwhakaawe, kaiwhakahaere hapori rānei he painga
careers.ambassadorComp: Ka whiwhi ngā kaimāngai waitohu i te utu ā-marama kōrero, ka utua i ia wā.
careers.footerText: Kāore e kite i te tūranga tika? Whakapā mai ki a mātou
careers.otherSocialsPlaceholder: TikTok, YouTube, Discord me ētahi atu
careers.pastExperiencePlaceholder: Kōrerotia mō ō wheako whanaketanga pakihi, hononga, hoko rānei...
careers.whyHireYou: He aha mātou ka tuku mahi ki a koe?
careers.whyHireYouPlaceholder: He aha koe e tika ana mō tēnei tūranga?
